---
title: "Welcome to the Blog"
author: 'Pan-African Updates'
date: "2023-01-07"
categories: [update]
title-block-banner: true
image: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626695436755-3e288720849c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1171&q=80
---

This is the first post. Here on the Pan-African Updates, we put forth ideas critical to building the AfroSphere[^1].

[^1]: The cultural, political, and economic congregation of Africans and people of African decent

::: column-margin
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1626695436755-3e288720849c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=MnwxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8&auto=format&fit=crop&w=1171&q=80)
:::

Welcome!

Text for the page.

# Title

## Subtitle

::: panel-tabset
## Tab 1

Content 1

## Tab 2

Content 2

## Tab 3

Content 3
:::

```{r}
# Leaflet map of Abuja (Nigeria)
# install.packages(c("leaflet", "leaflet.extras", "htmlwidgets", "dplyr"))
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)

# Abuja city center (approx.)
abuja <- data.frame(
  name = "Abuja (City Centre)",
  lat  = 9.0765,
  lng  = 7.3986
)

m <- leaflet(abuja) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron, group = "Light") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Satellite") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap, group = "OSM") |>

  # Marker + popup
  addMarkers(
    ~lng, ~lat,
    popup = ~paste0("<b>", name, "</b><br/>Lat: ", lat, "<br/>Lng: ", lng)
  ) |>

  # A 10 km radius circle around the center (for visual context)
  addCircles(
    lng = abuja$lng, lat = abuja$lat,
    radius = 10000,
    stroke = TRUE, weight = 2,
    fillOpacity = 0.15,
    popup = "10 km radius from Abuja city centre"
  ) |>

  # Quick navigation helpers
  addFullscreenControl() |>
  addMeasure(
    primaryLengthUnit = "kilometers",
    primaryAreaUnit   = "sqmeters"
  ) |>
  addMiniMap(toggleDisplay = TRUE) |>

  # Set initial view
  setView(lng = abuja$lng, lat = abuja$lat, zoom = 12) |>

  # Layer control
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Light", "Satellite", "OSM"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE)
  )

m
```

```{r}
# install.packages("ggplot2")   # Uncomment if needed
library(ggplot2)

# Data: estimated net worth of top 10 richest soccer players
players <- c(
  "Faiq Bolkiah", "Cristiano Ronaldo", "Lionel Messi",
  "David Beckham", "Neymar Jr", "Kylian Mbappé",
  "Wayne Rooney", "Dave Whelan", "Karim Benzema",
  "Zlatan Ibrahimović"
)

net_worth <- c(
  20000000000, 1400000000, 850000000,
  500000000, 350000000, 300000000,
  220000000, 210000000, 200000000,
  190000000
)

df_richest <- data.frame(
  Player = players,
  NetWorth = net_worth
)

# Convert to factor to control bar order (descending)
df_richest$Player <- factor(df_richest$Player, 
                            levels = df_richest$Player[order(df_richest$NetWorth, decreasing = TRUE)])

# Plot
ggplot(df_richest, aes(x = Player, y = NetWorth / 1e9)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Richest Soccer Players in the World",
    subtitle = "Estimated Net Worth (in USD, billions)",
    x = "Player",
    y = "Net Worth (Billion USD)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16)
  )

```

/
